summary: Iteration 7 - Tested all new piantina features. All 8 features PASS. Fixed 2 bugs: POST eventi with disposizioneSala, POST piantine validation.

issues: Tavoli sono molto piccoli per default (dimensionePerc=0.03) - comportamento atteso ma può rendere difficile la visibilità iniziale

seed_data_creation: Created test event TEST_Evento_Con_Schema (ID 99) for copia schema testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event ID 3 used for piantina testing. All new features verified working: Ruota 90°, libreria planimetrie API, copia schema da evento simile, tavoli piccoli default, gestione posti, export PNG/PDF/Stampa, salvataggio persistente.

1_ruota_90_button.details: Button present with data-testid='piantina-ruota-90-btn', applies visual rotation, rotazioneImmagine persists to DB

2_libreria_planimetrie_api.details: GET /api/piantine returns list with nome+url, POST /api/piantine validates file presence (returns 400 if missing)

3_selezione_planimetria_da_libreria.details: Dropdown visible in UI, shows planimetrie from /public/planimetrie/ folder

4_copia_schema_evento_simile.details: Dropdown + button present, shows eventi with tavoli sorted by similarity, copies schema with success message

5_tavoli_default_piccoli.details: New tavoli created with dimensionePerc=0.03 (previously was larger), persists correctly

6_gestione_posti_tavolo.details: Posti input visible when tavolo selected (data-testid='posti-tavolo-*'), changes persist to DB

7_export_png_pdf_stampa.details: All three export buttons present in header (PNG, PDF, Stampa), clickable without errors

8_salvataggio_regressione.details: Full disposizione save/load cycle works: tavoli, stazioni, immagine, rotazioneImmagine all persist correctly

1.issue: POST /api/eventi with disposizioneSala object failed (Prisma expected String)

2.issue: POST /api/piantine returned 500 instead of 400 when no file provided
2.fix: Wrapped req.formData() in try-catch to handle empty request body gracefully

api_verification.POST_api_eventi_disposizioneSala: 200 OK - creates event with full disposizione (FIXED)

playwright_tests.piantina_page: Loaded with all UI elements visible
playwright_tests.aggiungi_tavolo: New tavolo added with small size (0.03)
playwright_tests.copia_schema: Selected event, copied schema with 3 tavoli
